title: Subitem names (i.e. "text" value) missing?
excerpt:

posts.author: max (max)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi everyone, I have several automations set up in Integromat that require the ability to reference subitem names using the “Get an item” module on the subitems parent item.

Previously, I was having no trouble with this. The “Get an item” module would return subitems as one of the mappable column values, the subitems collection would contain the subitems’ names as text values, along with collections for Linked Pulse IDs (the item ids for the subitems).

Recently, the scenarios text/name values for the subitems started coming back empty. Any idea what’s going on?
